EXPERIMENT 6 — ITALIAN JEWS RECIPROCAL FULL MODERN PANEL

Italian Jews are the target. Pooled Ashkenazim, actual Calabrians and Sicilians, Maltese, Greeks, Northern Italians, Tuscany, and real Northern/Eastern Europeans all compete in the same panel.

==================== SOURCES ====================
Copy the coordinate lines below into the G25/Vahaduo Source box.
